reviews.review_msg: The most relevant class I have taken this semester. He teaches you how to think in terms of technology and come up with neat ideas that could land you a job.

Outstanding prof, encourages you to learn through engaging seminars. You will do poorly in this class if you don't speak up and collaborate with your peers to have meaningful discussions. Marking criteria was ambiguous but give the guy some credit - it's was first semester teaching. Definitely one of the better 400 level profs i've had.
Friendly prof, very approachable. But the lecture was super lame. 3D Printer? How is it related to Web 2.0?
Took four 4th year courses this semester and by far this class was the best.

He is a great prof with industry experience. Students who dont engage during class hate him because he points them out and lowers grades based on participation. New to the course but still a good prof!
Useless class. Too much discussion without learning anything important.
He knows what he is talking about, you can learn a lot.
This guy is no Drew Parker, but still a good prof and a valuable class.The material covered applies to the real world. Talk during class and you'll be fine. No books.
He cares about what he teaches and keeps it interesting. Cares a lot about participation and cheating. Overall a solid prof.
